title: Stichorkis gjellerupii

In traditional medicine, Stichorkis gjellerupii is often used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and to promote overall well-being.

Within the Orchidaceae family, Stichorkis gjellerupii can be further classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily is one of the four main subfamilies within the Orchidaceae family. Stichorkis gjellerupii is also classified as a member of the genus Stichorkis.
